heading: Requirements for authorizing representation activity
label: 288b Requirements for authorizing representation activity
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 3, 1979section 717 of Pub. L. 95–521section 288 of this title

children.heading: Direction of Joint Leadership Group or Senate resolution
children.label: a Direction of Joint Leadership Group or Senate resolution
children.text: The Counsel shall defend the Senate or a committee, subcommittee, Member, officer, or employee of the Senate under only when directed to do so by two-thirds of the Members of the Joint Leadership Group or by the adoption of a resolution by the Senate.section 288c of this title

children.heading: Civil action to enforce subpena
children.label: b Civil action to enforce subpena
children.text: The Counsel shall bring a civil action to enforce a subpena of the Senate or a committee or subcommittee of the Senate under only when directed to do so by the adoption of a resolution by the Senate.section 288d of this title

children.heading: Intervention or appearance
children.label: c Intervention or appearance
children.text: The Counsel shall intervene or appear as amicus curiae under only when directed to do so by a resolution adopted by the Senate when such intervention or appearance is to be made in the name of the Senate or in the name of an officer, committee, subcommittee, or chairman of a committee or subcommittee of the Senate.section 288e of this title
the Senate when directed to do so by an affirmative vote of a majority of the Members present of the Senate; or
a committee or subcommittee of the Senate when directed to do so by an affirmative vote of two-thirds of the members of the full committee.

children.heading: Resolution recommendations
children.label: e Resolution recommendations
children.text: The Office shall make no recommendation with respect to the consideration of a resolution under this section.
